events.text: Goal!  Argentina 1, Saudi Arabia 0. Lionel Messi (Argentina) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Argentina 1, Saudi Arabia 1. Saleh Al Shehri (Saudi Arabia) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Feras Al Brikan.
Goal!  Argentina 1, Saudi Arabia 2. Salem Al Dawsari (Saudi Arabia) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner.
Abdulelah Al Malki (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ali Al Bulayhi (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card.
Salem Al Dawsari (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card.
Saud Abdulhamid (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Nawaf Al Abid (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card.
Mohammed Al Owais (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card.
